ddt:Target.Name: X10_L38_EV_BMS_v4.35
ddt:Target.Description: DELETE LID: 21_60_01: SOHE Command Reset Correction of anomaly in base 4.33 A lot of LID can only by read manually UPDATE SNAPSHOT: 14_25 Display is not correct 2012/06/06 New software: no still PS (B10 --> 50x L38--> 51x) Database to use X10_L38_EV_BMS_v4.32.xml UPDATE LID: 21_67_03 21_67_51 LID drving mode --> Précedement on incrémentait de 2 tous les 2mn, on incrémente maintenant de 1 par palier de 2 minutes UPDATE SNAPSHOT: 1411 HVIsolationImpedance bit rate = 1000 (précédemmt 100) 140b Current sensor offset = un offset de -500 ampère a été ajouté pour avoir une valeur correct 1415 Pack Voltage a été corrigé. La valeur avait été passé en valeur signé dans la base 4.31 UPDATE SNAPSHOT and LID: L ensemble des services accessibles en session after sales request ainsi que les snapshots sont consultables via CLIP [2012/05/22 New software: no still PS (B10 --> 50x L38--> 51x) Database to use X10_L38_EV_BMS_v4.31.xml UPDATE: Sum of Cell voltage is 0.01 and not 0.001 Driving history unity go to "Mn" Base is updated to display service request: 310005 310006 310007 310008 310009 310010 2012/05/10 New software: no still PS (B10 --> 50x L38--> 51x) Database to use: X10_L38_EV_BMS_v4.3.xml UPDATE: Electric current (LID 21_01#03) //Correction de la définition incorect// 2012/03/19 New Software: PS (B10 --> 50x L38--> 51x) Database to use: X10_L38_EV_BMS_v4.3.xml ADD: DTC: [L38] 33_B2_1C TS (Temperature Sensing) Circuit Failure for ONLY L38 LID: 21_61_03 Present Full Capacity B10 21_61_07 SOHP Value of Group1 B10 21_61_08 SOHP Value of Group2 B10 21_61_09 SOHP Value of Group3 26-02-2012: Snapshot 141A Update; snapshot 1424_LBC RefusetoSleep invert value of numeric list); in LID 30-->34 for Operating type / USOC END/USOC START--> change to not Indian coding. Update screens. Add LID 60, LID 61 --> 17 bytes --> 18 bytes

Item.Text: [P33D4] Battery State of Health Power has low value
[P33B1] Battery System has many failure on thermistors (1-12)
[P33B2] Battery System has many failure on thermistors (13-24)
Device and failure type ODB codding
circuit short to ground or open
circuit short to battery or open
signal rate of change below threshold
signal rate of change above threshold
signal bias level oor / zero adjustment failure
signal has too few transitions / events
signal has too many transitions / events
alive / sequence counter incorrect / not updated
value of signal protection calculation incorrect

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.AgingCounter
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData AgingCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Data.Name: DTCExtendedData.Mileage
Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData Mileage (use by Failure Page to decode data)

Item.Text: After sale request/ Clear Safet Mode

Data.Name: 3B_64_#03_Number of times where AVCC NG occurs during a life
RoutineEntryStatus
Data.Comment: Routine entry status for recive data

Data.Name: 21_01_#45_bit2_Filtered Poor Joint Detector Input Port Flug
21_01_#45_bit4_bit5_Interlock Status sent by CAN(regarding CAN data about interlock "interlock battery")
140C_AD value of Sensor Power Supply Voltage
21_03#05 Battery SOC of cell lowest voltage
21_03#07 Battery SOC of cell highest voltage
21_61_#16_Sum of kWh from beginning of Battery life

Data.Comment: Description of the extendedData DTCOccurenceCounter (use by Failure Page to decode data)
